metadata.description: Table 3: Wage compression DiD decomposition into mechanical (composition) and genuine components
metadata.source_script: Computed analytically from mw_complete_margins.py wage_compression output + new_arrivals share
metadata.method: mechanical = DiD predicted if existing compression-zone workers grew at high-wage rate and new arrivals enter at log(MW_new). genuine = total DiD minus mechanical.

cross_check.note: Table 3 rounds to -0.035 / -0.050 / -0.069. Decomposition values (mechanical/genuine) were computed analytically and are not separately stored in mw_complete_margins.json.
